content.en:
The depths of the Yuanji Abyss.

The six first-class invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea all gathered here, and this was already all the first-class invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea in the Yuanji Abyss, except for the leader.

In fact, there were naturally more first-class invincibles in the Heavenly Wind Sea, but the first-class invincibles in the Tianlin Realm did not dare to come out at all, and one came out before, and they were killed by the supreme person in the Netherworld Hall in an instant.

It is a shameless thing for the Supreme One to kill the invincible, but the Netherworld Temple did just that, and it happened outside the Tianlin Realm, which was not suitable for the affairs of the Tianlin Realm, so even the three supreme beings of the Tianlin Realm could not control the Supreme of the Netherworld Temple.

Therefore, Tianfeng Sea has no support.

The Netherworld Hall was different, they sent thirty-two first-class invincible people to surround the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea, if it weren't for the place where the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea was located was too dangerous, otherwise the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea would have died a long time ago.

"Rush!"

The six first-class invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea instantly killed from one direction, trying to break the blockade of the Netherworld Temple, thus entering the space where the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea was located.

However, they still underestimated the Netherworld.

Bang!!!!

The battle of dozens of first-class invincible people fluctuated too much, causing a shock in the entire Yuan Extreme Abyss.

Many invincibles knew that there were many first-class invincible battles, so many first-class invincibles from other forces were curious about what was going on.

Soon, word spread.

The Netherworld Temple has fought against the invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea.

As for the matter of the Netherworld Temple and the Heavenly Wind Sea, many invincible people in the Yuanji Abyss had heard about it, so they were all curious about what the result would be, and they all paid attention to it.

"It's a fight!"

Ye Tian guessed that the treasure of Tianfeng Sea must have been delivered, but as for what the treasure was and what it was used for, he didn't know anything at all.

He didn't have the idea of getting involved, after all, with his strength, he didn't even have the qualifications to participate.

He was only a first-class invincible, and the two sides fighting were first-class invincibles, and they were first-class invincibles of the Saint-Name-level forces and the Eternal Name-level forces, and he could be annihilated countless times with a wave of his hand.

Although he didn't know what was going on, the news of the Yuanji Abyss spread very quickly, and with the understanding of people with a heart, a secret story soon came out.

"The leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea actually got a chance in the Yuanji Abyss and is qualified to be promoted to the Supreme Realm!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He also finally knew why the Netherworld Temple had to deal with the Heavenly Wind Sea, because this opportunity was snatched away by the Heavenly Wind Sea, could the Netherworld Temple not be angry?

Subsequently, Ye Tian spent a lot of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals to purchase specific information.

For example, the treasure escorted by Tianfeng Hai this time was also inquired about, and it was the eternal source soul bluegold.

If you want to be supreme, you must rely on the Eternal Source.

In the Heavenly Lin Realm, it was almost difficult to find out how to attack the secrets of the Supreme One.

But on the side of the Yuanji Abyss, there is extremely chaos here, any secrets, knowledge and even treasures can be taken out and sold, so the secrets of the invincible to attack the supreme can naturally be taken out and sold, and many invincible people know such secrets.

An invincible person who merges the physical tribulation realm and the soul tribulation realm is a first-class invincible, and it is extremely difficult for a first-class invincible person to achieve a supreme one.

First of all, the first-class invincible must create a supreme skill, which is related to future breakthroughs, so it must be chosen well.

First-class invincibles with supreme skills are also extremely rare, and they belong to the truly invincible existence among first-class invincibles.

After creating the supreme skill, the first-class invincible needs to refine the body to the eternal immortal eternal body, this step is even more difficult, it can't be done without enough precious resources, and such resources are too rare, even the eternal name level forces may not have them, it depends on luck.

And this time, the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea found such a resource in the Yuanji Abyss, and snatched such a resource from the hands of the first-class invincible people of the Netherworld, and successfully turned his body into an eternal tribulation.

Supreme skill, eternal calamity.

After satisfying these two conditions, only the second condition remains, and that is to use the Eternal Source to break through.

The Eternal Source contains a mysterious substance that can break the shackles and rise to the Supreme Realm.

However, if the Eternal Source is not compatible with oneself enough, it will not be able to break through.

Therefore, when creating a supreme technique, it is necessary to think clearly, and it is best to create a supreme technique that can fit with the eternal source matter.

For example, the supreme technique created by the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea is in line with the soul bluegold, and it is a soul supreme skill.

However, the eternal source of soul lapis is of great help to the Heavenly Wind Sea, and many invincible people are refining their souls and states of mind with the help of the Soul Lapis Metal, so they have been staying in the Heavenly Wind Sea.

After all, no one expected that the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea would suddenly complete the Eternal Tribulation, and he would be trapped, unable to get out, and would not even dare to leave the Yuanji Abyss.

Therefore, there was no way, so he ordered people to send the soul green gold to the Yuanji Abyss, otherwise the future of Tianfeng Hai would be really worrying if he offended the Netherworld Palace.

But if a supreme being is born, then the wind and sea will not be afraid of the Netherworld Temple that day.

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

As a member of the Heavenly Wind Sea, he naturally hoped that the Heavenly Wind Sea would give birth to a Supreme One, so that he would not have to fear the Netherworld Temple.

At the same time, he was very excited.

How precious the Eternal Source is it, even if it is the Heavenly Wind Sea, it is estimated that there are not many, and there may even be only one Eternal Source Object of the Soul Blue, so it is estimated that it is impossible for him to obtain the Eternal Source Object from the Heavenly Wind Sea, but he himself has the Eternal Source Object.

Void gold mountain!

If he obtains the realm of a first-class invincible person in the future, he can completely create a supreme technique that can fit the Void Mi Golden Mountain, so as to refine the Void Mi Golden Mountain and be promoted to the Supreme One.

Of course.

He had to find the treasure resources that could transform his body into an eternal body, otherwise it would be difficult for him to be promoted to the Supreme One.

And at this time, in the depths of the Yuanji Abyss, the battle situation underwent an astonishing change.

The six first-class invincible people of Tianfeng Sea were severely injured one after another, but at the critical moment, the leader of Tianfeng Sea rushed out from the depths of Yuanji.

Rumble!!!

A huge figure walked out from the depths of the Yuanji Abyss, and a terrifying soul attack instantly made the bodies of eight or nine first-class invincible people freeze, and then a hand slapped them away, showing an invincible posture.

Although he couldn't kill these invincibles, he could save the six invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea in time.

"Let's go!"

The leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea escorted six first-class invincible people into the depths of the Yuanji Abyss and successfully retreated.

Many of the first-class invincibles in the Nether Temple were furious, but they did not dare to chase after them.

There are a large number of Abyssal Tribulation Beasts there, many of which are comparable to more than 100,000 Tribulation Beasts, but the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea is good at soul invincible skills, and one of the invincible skills can deter the souls of abyss tribulation beasts, making them jealous, so that they dare not make a move.

But they didn't have such means, once they entered there, they would definitely be attacked by a large number of Abyss Tribulation Beasts, and they would inevitably suffer heavy casualties at that time.

The other side.

The leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea took six first-class invincible people into a relatively small area, and there were many abyssal robbers around, and they tried their best to restrain their aura, while the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea continued to have the aura of soul invincible skills all the time, making the abyssal tribulation beasts reluctant to approach.

"Heavenly Wind Supreme, the thing has arrived!"

Chen Ling Supreme took out the box and said.

And the Heavenly Wind Supreme is the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea, this is his title.
